Our Foundation

Mission & Vision

The twin pillars that anchor everything we do as a prophetic and apostolic expression of God's Kingdom.

M
Mission Statement

Mobilizing the Global Church into Christ-Centred Unity

To awaken and mobilize the global Church into Christ-centered unity, sacrificial love, and the full expression of the dominion mandate; fostering spiritual maturity, Kingdom authority, and all-round prosperity — spiritually, physically, and socially — until the Body of Christ attains the fullness of Christ.

John 17:20–23 · Genesis 1:26–31 · Ephesians 4:13

V
Vision Statement

Advancing the Great Commission with Power

To advance the Great Commission as mandated in Mark 16:15–16 and Matthew 28:18–20 by proclaiming the Gospel of Jesus Christ with power, bringing holistic deliverance to individuals and communities, awakening global consciousness to the imminent return of our Lord Jesus Christ, and equipping believers to live in readiness, purity, and spiritual authority for His Second Coming.

Mark 16:15–16 · Matthew 28:18–20

The Eternal Truth

When God speaks, it must HAYAH — it must become.

We are not merely a gathering of believers — we are a movement of Divine manifestation, called to reveal the reality of God in our generation and to see His Kingdom established on earth as it is in heaven.

Our Full Story →
H
Hayah Ministries International Inc.

A movement of Divine manifestation — called to reveal the reality of God in our generation. When God speaks, it must HAYAH.
